title: Prove every Zephyr firmware boots
description: Create reproducible boot evidence for every tracked Zephyr firmware root: firmware/bridge-zephyr, lichen/apps/gateway, lichen/apps/puck, lichen/samples/lora_ping, lichen/apps/test_blink, and all 37 lichen/tests Zephyr applications. A successful build is not boot proof. Each root must reach an externally observed late marker, protocol effect, radio transmission, hardware enumeration/response, or passing ztest. Exercise every declared executable backend that is currently supportable; record unsupported, orphaned, stale, or hardware-only targets as explicit blocked/fail Beads with evidence rather than silently omitting them.
acceptance_criteria: 1. A canonical manifest lists every tracked Zephyr firmware root and declared target/backend. 2. Every firmware root has at least one independent runtime boot result. 3. Every currently executable declared backend is exercised. 4. Each result is recorded as WIN, FAIL, or BLOCKED with command, source revision, artifact hash, logs, and oracle. 5. Every FAIL/BLOCKED result has a linked remediation or human/hardware dependency Bead. 6. Temporary AWS resources are cleaned up and persistent EBS is available/unattached. 7. Three independent review passes validate coverage and evidence quality.
notes:
FINAL ZEPHYR BOOT EVIDENCE. 42 firmware roots: 39 WIN, 3 BLOCKED. 62 test scenarios: 60 WIN, 2 BLOCKED. 42 production/sample target rows: 9 WIN, 18 FAIL, 15 BLOCKED. Per app: bridge 2/12/2; gateway 2/2/6; puck 2/4/5; lora_ping 3/0/1; test_blink 0/0/1. Every WIN has an independent runtime oracle; every FAIL/BLOCKED links a remediation or dependency Bead. Evidence: ARM Twister reports under /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1 with hashes in m5m1.5; production/lora evidence under /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/lichen-m5m1-nine-runs-20260716T1800Z, 104-entry manifest SHA-256 a49d5fd7b6a9d47f064f5d13fb6ffad902be5d2948f11d25274ee834ddb8c7ef. Source identity and authoritative reconciliation are in m5m1.8. AWS cleanup complete: builders i-03d978911e97d4350 and i-0b9423e5181dd9066 terminated; persistent EBS vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb available/unattached; no active opencode-session LICHEN instances.
PUBLICATION ORACLE CLARIFICATION: bridge WIN is late startup only (Zephyr boot plus main ready), not L2/protocol proof. Gateway/puck use late application/service/protocol markers; lora_ping uses independent simulator transmission counts; tests use passing ztests. Exact untracked source fingerprint recipe and cited review trail are recorded in m5m1.9. Native32 follow-up o4yi now provisions a replacement x86 builder because the audit builder was intentionally terminated during cleanup.
FINAL TAXONOMY CORRECTION: 42 firmware roots = 39 WIN, 2 FAIL, 1 BLOCKED. FAIL: app_identity and ping_l2 reproducibly crash with idle-thread stack-canary fatals on valid ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 execution; tracked by b9od and 35qo. BLOCKED: test_blink only, pending authorized T1000-E hardware observation under 902l. 62 test scenarios = 60 WIN, 2 FAIL, 0 BLOCKED. Production/sample target rows remain 9 WIN, 18 FAIL, 15 BLOCKED.
close_reason: Final corrected result: 42 firmware roots = 39 WIN, 2 software FAIL, 1 hardware BLOCKED; all target evidence, remediation, reviews, and AWS cleanup retained.
